entries.evidence: Future refresh still discovers/seeds fixtures through provider-backed scheduler; Matchday V2 is source-reviewed but not runtime owner.
entries.required_resolution: Route all runtime discovery through Matchday V2 or demote future_refresh discovery to compatibility with explicit deletion condition.

entries.evidence: Name-only mappings are REVIEW_REQUIRED; APPROVED requires W2 team id.
entries.required_resolution: Materialize reviewed crosswalk for runtime F5/F8 consumers.

entries.evidence: V2 is declared in checkpoint_refresh, but legacy constants/fallback and future_refresh checkpoint_mode remain present.
entries.required_resolution: Make V2 the only active scheduler policy; remove fallback offsets after tests prove zero callers.

entries.evidence: FutureRefreshService can call provider and write DB; Matchday V2 endpoint contract exists but live executor is gated/not wired.
entries.required_resolution: Single provider front door must create endpoint capture first; all scheduler/worker paths consume that contract.

entries.canonical_authority: target: endpoint capture/raw payload hash registry
entries.evidence: raw_payload, raw_payload_references and matchday_endpoint_captures coexist with different identity surfaces.
entries.required_resolution: Choose one raw payload identity and map old tables as compatibility.

entries.evidence: future_market_observation and odds_observations both represent market facts; V2 observations are not yet sole runtime write path.
entries.required_resolution: Normalize provider odds into one observation table/read model with shared quote hash.

entries.evidence: AH/OU candidate selection exists; formal AH builder still has its own canonical AH checks.
entries.required_resolution: Unify AH/OU candidate identity before formal unlock.

entries.evidence: V3 decision hash includes selected quote identity; lock projection does not recompute.
entries.required_resolution: Backfill all read models to expose same quote hash.

entries.evidence: Matchday V2 enforces authoritative captured_at; legacy read surfaces still compute readiness independently.
entries.required_resolution: Use V2 freshness status as one read-model input.

entries.evidence: Selection separates AH/OU and does not require joint baseline completeness.
entries.required_resolution: Document compatibility rules for older analysis_recommendation outputs.

entries.evidence: Calibration/admission artifacts exist but formal training/approval remains manual stop.
entries.required_resolution: Do not promote beyond BASELINE_PRIOR/SHADOW until approved hashes exist.

entries.canonical_authority: devig market baseline, not independent model evidence
entries.evidence: Analysis evidence carries market probability; audit must prevent it being treated as independent model probability.
entries.required_resolution: Add explicit field-level provenance labels across V3 projection.

entries.evidence: analysis_direction_allowed is separate from market movement/bookmaker intent.
entries.required_resolution: Keep market_movement.direction_allowed advisory only, not recommendation authority.

entries.evidence: LMM is current lineup authority; injuries/statistics disabled in Matchday V2 policy.
entries.required_resolution: Deprecate old F10/injuries paths once callers are proven zero.

entries.canonical_authority: target: canonical team-history query backed by Football-Data facts
entries.evidence: Private F5 dataset exists locally, but ingest manifest states W2_CANONICAL_IMPORT_NOT_EXECUTED and W2_RUNTIME_F5_NOT_READY.
entries.required_resolution: Import reviewed facts into canonical DB/read service and bind to code/data asset registry.

entries.canonical_authority: target: reviewed as-of team value artifact/DB identity
entries.evidence: Static config, Transfermarkt artifact and DB models coexist; runtime reviewed as-of authority not proven.
entries.required_resolution: Make one reviewed F8 artifact/table canonical and mark config snapshots compatibility.

entries.evidence: Requires capability, evidence hashes and human approval; default remains disabled.
entries.required_resolution: No formal unlock until audit P0s are closed.

entries.evidence: V3 exists, but legacy WATCH/SKIP/FORMAL renderers and report states remain active compatibility/read authorities.
entries.required_resolution: Enforce one V3 decision hash as source for API, Dashboard, frozen artifact, tracking and reporting.

entries.evidence: Projection is lock_eligible=false; legacy lock tables still exist.
entries.required_resolution: Prove old lock ledgers cannot be written from ANALYSIS_PICK before unlock.

entries.evidence: Multiple settlement utilities exist across Stage3/Gate5/forward ledger.
entries.required_resolution: Bind settlement to decision_hash/lock_id identity and demote legacy utilities.

entries.evidence: V3 corpus describes cohort membership; runtime canonical cohort table ownership still split with audit export.
entries.required_resolution: One cohort membership table/read model keyed by decision_hash.

entries.canonical_authority: canonical_decision_projection should be sole display adapter
entries.evidence: Dashboard consumes API and frozen artifacts; V2 task left apps/web diff zero, so projection unification remains separate.
entries.required_resolution: Dashboard must read one V3 projection, never recompute or override canonical status.
